'''Mortimon Galli''' was a retired fortune hunter. He owned the [[Last Stand Casino]] and was fond of antiques and artifacts. While he showed no allegiance to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] or the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he deeply despised the latter. It was thought they were responsible for the death of his beloved wife, which drove the fight out of him and crushed his spirit.<ref name="Game" />
